calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Claim Atty Fees
Off Calendar Dec-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion to Claim Attorney fees hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Appearances:
Michael C. Hall, Esq. present.
Defendant, Erin Andrews present without filing opposition documents.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court grants and awarded attorney fees in the amount of $2,475.00
Order signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-03-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Michael C. Hall, Esq., for Plaintiffs: Edward Bingham and Marylee Smith Bingham
No appearance by the Defendant: Erin Andrews
09:30 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Marylee Smith Bingham was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement --------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three day notice --------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiffs and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises located at: 165 Peralta Ave., #1, San Francisco.
Principal $4,888.59
Attorney's Fees and Costs per notice motion.
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.
Defendant appeared in Dept. #218 at 09:27 am., after judgment was granted, Plaintiff's counsel objected to Court's own motion to striked court judgment.
Judgment stands.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEPT 206 JUDGE PRO TEM GILBERT JAY, CLERK IRIS HAMMER, M.HALL, ESQ. FOR PLNTF. DFT IN PRO PER PRESENT IN COURT. SC HELD, CASE NOT SETTLED AND TO REMAIN ON 11/3/03 JURY TRIAL CALENDAR
